title: senna affinis
intro: Senna affinis, also known as Semen sennae, is a plant species commonly used in traditional herbal medicine. It is a perennial shrub native to India and Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which have laxative, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senna affinis include treating constipation, digestive issues, and certain skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural dye. In herbal preparations, Senna affinis seeds are often combined with other herbs and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to promote bowel regularity and soothe digestive discomfort.
